All Classes and Interfaces

Classes
Class
Description
IPAddressDeserializer<I extends IPAddress<?>>
Base class for all deserializers for IPAddress and sub classes.
IPAddressDeserializer.AnyVersion
A deserializer for IPAddress.
IPAddressDeserializer.IPv4
A deserializer for IPv4Address.
IPAddressDeserializer.IPv6
A deserializer for IPv6Address.
IPAddressSerializer<I extends IPAddress<?>>
Base class for all serializers for IPAddress and sub classes.
IPAddressSerializer.AnyVersion
A serializer for IPAddress.
IPAddressSerializer.IPv4
A serializer for IPv4Address.
IPAddressSerializer.IPv6
A serializer for IPv4Address.
IPModule
A module that adds support for serializing and deserializing IP addresses and ranges values.
IPRangeDeserializer<R extends IPRange<?>>
Base class for all deserializers for IPRange and sub types.
IPRangeDeserializer.AnyVersion
A deserializer for IPRange.
IPRangeDeserializer.IPv4
A deserializer for IPv4Range.
IPRangeDeserializer.IPv6
A deserializer for IPv6Range.
IPRangeSerializer<R extends IPRange<?>>
Base class for all serializers for IPRange and sub types.
IPRangeSerializer.AnyVersion
A serializer for IPRange.
IPRangeSerializer.IPv4
A serializer for IPv4Range.
IPRangeSerializer.IPv6
A serializer for IPv6Range.
SubnetDeserializer<S extends Subnet<?>>
Base class for all deserializers for Subnet and sub classes.
SubnetDeserializer.AnyVersion
A deserializer for Subnet.
SubnetDeserializer.IPv4
A deserializer for IPv4Subnet.
SubnetDeserializer.IPv6
A deserializer for IPv6Subnet.
SubnetSerializer<S extends Subnet<?>>
Base class for all serializers for Subnet and sub types.
SubnetSerializer.AnyVersion
A serializer for Subnet.
SubnetSerializer.IPv4
A serializer for IPv4Range.
SubnetSerializer.IPv6
A serializer for IPv6Range.
